'''ZRX-29s''' were [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] available on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were available in [[red]].

[[Sassich]] purchased one after becoming [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] director, although [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] [[Nyche/Legends|mother]] preferred the [[ZX-26 airspeeder|ZX-26]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
